name: book_meeting_room
description: Book a meeting room for a specific date and time. The room must be available at the requested time slot. Use list_available_rooms first if you need to find room IDs.

room_id.description: The room ID to book, e.g. 'room_a', 'room_b', 'room_c'. You can also use the room name.

date.description: Date for the booking in YYYY-MM-DD format, e.g. '2026-02-14'

start_time.description: Start time in HH:MM format (24-hour), e.g. '14:00'

end_time.description: End time in HH:MM format (24-hour), e.g. '15:00'

purpose.description: Purpose of the meeting, e.g. 'Team standup'
